prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA888 Gen 3 (CJXA 2.0L TSI)** with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83mm, 9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Paired with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** for 450whp on E85 with a **Bosch Motorsport 0261S02088 high-flow fuel pump** and **Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors**.

Custom **034 Motorsport billet aluminum engine mounts** and **Neuspeed torque arm insert** to handle increased power, alongside a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** with a ** Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel** for improved drivetrain response. The transmission is upgraded to a **VW 02Q 6-speed DSG** with a **Revo Stage 2 TCU tune** and **South Bend DSG clutch pack** for 500+ lb-ft torque capacity.

Full **KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit** (3-way adjustable, 400lb/in front springs, 500lb/in rear springs) with **034 Motorsport sway bars (25mm front, 22mm rear)** and **Whiteline adjustable end links**. Braking is handled by **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers (355mm discs)** and **4-piston rear calipers (330mm discs)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (SP1-specific, 3-piece overfenders with carbon fiber front splitter and duckbill rear wing) finished in **PPG Porsche GT3 RS Lime Gold** with **3M Matte Black wrap accents** on the roof and pillars. Custom **Volk Racing TE37SL 18x9.5 +35 front / 18x10.5 +40 rear** wheels with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)** and **Project Kics R40 6x139.7 wheel spacers**.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (SP1-specific, vented with integrated NACA ducts) and **custom rear diffuser** by **Perrin Performance** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor bung** for real-time AFR monitoring. **Morimoto XB LED headlights** with **Lux H1 HID projectors** and **custom C-shaped LED DRLs** integrated into the bumper.

**Recaro SPG XL seats** (SP1-specific, carbon fiber backs) upholstered in **Alcantara with yellow stitching** and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. **Custom roll cage** by **Autopower Industries** (MIG-welded, 4-point with harness bar) and **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub**. Interior stripped of sound deadening, replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** for weight reduction.
